title: OatProtein Bowl
description: A rich and chewy Greek-style bowl featuring ground oats that are simmered for a high-protein, one-pot meal.

ingredients.name: 2 cups unsweetened almond milk or coconut water

instructions: In a medium saucepan, combine oats and almond milk. Bring to a boil over medium heat.
Reduce heat to low, add hemp protein powder and sea salt. Stir well until combined.
Simmer for about 15-20 minutes or until thickened, stirring occasionally to prevent burning.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh fruits like berries, drizzled honey, or sprinkle of nuts.
